Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import urllib.request, json, sys
req = urllib.request.Request\('https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Special:EntityData/Q59282644.json',
    headers={'User-Agent': 'ModernQuickstatements/1.0 \(research\)'}\)
d = json.loads\(urllib.request.urlopen\(req\).read\(\)\)
e = d['entities']['Q59282644']
claims = e.get\('claims', {}\)
for prop in ['P361', 'P1448', 'P6375']:
    stmts = claims.get\(prop, []\)
    print\(f'{prop}: {len\(stmts\)} statement\(s\)'\)
    for s in stmts:
        rank = s.get\('rank', 'unknown'\)
        mv = s.get\('mainsnak', {}\).get\('datavalue', {}\)
        if mv.get\('type'\) == 'wikibase-entityid':
            val = mv['value'].get\('id', '?'\)
        elif mv.get\('type'\) == 'monolingualtext':
            val = mv['value'].get\('text', '?'\) + ' [' + mv['value'].get\('language', '?'\) + ']'
        elif mv.get\('type'\) == 'string':
            val = mv.get\('value', '?'\)
        else:
            val = str\(mv\)
        print\(f'  - {val} \(rank: {rank}\)'\)
")
